text.title: Conflict Resolution Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "tk_mode": "collaborating", "observation": "In the last 3 sprints the deploy ticket I assigned was returned without comments 14h after the SLA.", "feeling": "I feel frustrated and uncertain about how to plan next sprint.", "need": "predictability and clarity on shared deliverables", "request": "Would you commit to a 4h response window during business hours starting next Monday, or propose an alternative we both agree to by Friday?" }

example.note: tk_mode invalid; observation is evaluation; feeling is pseudo-feeling ('you upset me').

list.item: Feeling field not starting with 'I feel '.
Observation containing pseudo-quote of intent ('you were trying to').
Request without time bound or in negative framing ('stop X').
